CM+USB (non-CM failures)
actually fixed CM failures, but not considered, with the exception of:
128 (catastrophic)
263 (h)
282 (h)
403 (h)
516 (75)

USB+BID
all -- half of brain gone

USB+LIT
all -- limitation is mask alignment

USB+USB
all -- catastrophic
